As a member of the Ericaceae family, Kablikia minima is closely related to other heath and heather species.

The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation, protecting against cell damage, and preventing the growth of microorganisms.
